customer: I can't access my invoice. Can you resend it?
ideal_reply: Thanks for reaching out. I've resent the invoice to your registered email. Please let us know if you face any further issues.

customer: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits?
ideal_reply: We do offer special pricing for nonprofits. Could you share more details about your organization so we can assist you better?

customer: My account was charged twice. Please help.
ideal_reply: Sorry for the inconvenience. We've checked and refunded the duplicate charge. It should reflect in your account within 3-5 business days.

customer: Can I upgrade my plan mid-cycle?
ideal_reply: Yes, you can upgrade anytime. The new plan will be applied immediately and charges will be adjusted on a pro-rata basis.
